gt_sql: SELECT T3.DisplayName, T1.Title FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.BountyAmount = 50 AND T1.Title LIKE '%variance%'

pred_sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName, p.Title
FROM votes v
JOIN posts p ON v.PostId = p.Id
JOIN users u ON v.UserId = u.Id
WHERE v.BountyAmount = 50
AND p.Title LIKE '%variance%';
question: Which user added a bounty amount of 50 to the post title mentioning variance?
